prompt: A client invested $100,000 in a fund. After 6 months the fund was up 15% and they added another $50,000. After another 6 months the total value is $178,000. Calculate both the time-weighted return (TWR) and the money-weighted return (MWR/IRR) and explain why they differ.

assertions.text: Shows sub-period return calculations step by step
Identifies TWR as manager skill, MWR as investor experience
